title: Horn Of The Sea
description: The Horn of the Sea is a mystical artifact forged by combining the power of land and sea. Crafted using a Goat Horn and the rare Heart of the Sea, this enchanted horn can be used only in ocean biomes to summon 2 dolphins to assist your needs!
body:
Call upon the ocean’s grace!
The Horn of the Sea is a mystical artifact forged by combining the power of land and sea. Crafted using a Goat Horn and the rare Heart of the Sea, this enchanted horn can be used only in ocean biomes to summon the aid of the ocean’s swiftest allies.

When blown, the Horn of the Sea summons two dolphins to your side. These loyal marine companions will swim alongside you, granting Dolphin’s Grace and helping you zip through the depths at high speed — perfect for underwater travel, treasure hunting, or escaping danger.

🔹 Features:
- Horn of the Sea: A powerful new item crafted from:
  
  -🐐 Goat Horn
  
  -💙 Heart of the Sea
- Biome-Specific Use: Functions only in ocean biomes for balanced gameplay.
- Dolphin Summoning: Instantly calls 2 dolphins to assist the player.
- Immersive Utility: Adds depth to underwater exploration and ocean adventures.
- Cooldown System: Prevents spam usage to maintain fair play.

Craft it, dive deep, and let the seas sing in your favor!
